subcodes.first_line: O Haydar-'Alí! On this day, which is the third Festival of Islam, the Greater Branch made mention of thee; whereupon the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حیدر قبل علی الیوم که یوم سیم عید اسلامست غصن اکبر ذکر شما را نموده لذا قلم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
